'''gamuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nobilitie|nobilitie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-m-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nobilitie|nobilitie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gamuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæmihith|gæmihith]] || [[word:gæmihij|gæmihij]] || [[word:gæmihish|gæmihish]] || [[word:gæmihi|gæmihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gamumuhuth|gamumuhuth]] || [[word:gamumuhuj|gamumuhuj]] || [[word:gamumuhush|gamumuhush]] || [[word:gamumuhu|gamumuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gamuhuth|gamuhuth]] || [[word:gamuhuj|gamuhuj]] || [[word:gamuhush|gamuhush]] || [[word:gamuhu|gamuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gamufhuth|gamufhuth]] || [[word:gamufhuj|gamufhuj]] || [[word:gamufhush|gamufhush]] || [[word:gamufhuf|gamufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gamuhuthu|gamuhuthu]] || [[word:gamuhuju|gamuhuju]] || [[word:gamuhushu|gamuhushu]] || [[word:gamuhuku|gamuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gamuhuth|gamuhuth]] || [[word:gamuhuj|gamuhuj]] || [[word:gamuhush|gamuhush]] || [[word:gamuhu|gamuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gamuhuthul|gamuhuthul]] || [[word:gamuhujul|gamuhujul]] || [[word:gamuhushul|gamuhushul]] || [[word:gamuhukul|gamuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gamuhuthuthu|gamuhuthuthu]] || [[word:gamuhujuju|gamuhujuju]] || [[word:gamuhushushu|gamuhushushu]] || [[word:gamuhuku|gamuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gamuhuthun|gamuhuthun]] || [[word:gamuhujun|gamuhujun]] || [[word:gamuhushun|gamuhushun]] || [[word:gamuhukun|gamuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gamuhuthuoro|gamuhuthuoro]] || [[word:gamuhujuoro|gamuhujuoro]] || [[word:gamuhushuoro|gamuhushuoro]] || [[word:gamuhukuoro|gamuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
